---
title: "Retrieval-augmented Generation for Automated Written Corrective Feedback: From Dataset to Human Evaluation"
subtitle: "CLIN 35, 2025"
description: "Retrieval-augmented generation for automated written corrective feedback in second language acquisition."
author:
  - name: Jasper Degraeuwe
  - name: Thomas Moerman
date: 2025-06-01
categories: [Educational NLP]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "35th Meeting of Computational Linguistics in the Netherlands (CLIN 35)"
google-scholar: true
---

Work on retrieval-augmented generation for automated written corrective feedback in second language acquisition, moving from dataset construction toward human evaluation.

Research theme: [Educational NLP](../research.qmd#educational-nlp)
